# Runtime Evidence Governance Plan

This planning note records future runtime evidence governance concepts only. It is not an executable workflow.

## Future Concepts

- Replay evidence planning
- Audit evidence planning
- Trace evidence planning
- Approval evidence planning
- Escalation evidence planning
- Reviewer evidence planning
- Evidence lineage review
- Evidence verification review
- Fail-closed evidence review

## Boundaries

This plan does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, branch protection settings, evidence storage, route rewrites, route deletion, or automatic approvals.
